benefits.description: Legs feel less sore than they normally would 2 days after working them

side_effects.description: Complete inability to sleep first night; woke up periodically throughout the night after lowering dose and adding melatonin and L-Theanine

protocol_notes: Started at 15 units (clinic-recommended dose), pinned 3 hours fasted before bed. Updated to 12 units with melatonin 3mg, L-Theanine 200mg 1 hour before bed, and Magnesium Glycinate 240mg 30 minutes before bed, 2 hours fasted. Planning to lower dose further to 8 units.
